page: OVHcloud t1-le-45 is a KVM-based virtual server in the Cloud GPU family. It features an Intel Xeon Silver 4214 processor with 8 dedicated physical cores running at 3.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 45.0 GB of system memory, a 300 GB local NVMe SSD, and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Acceleration is provided by a single NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB of dedicated VRAM.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance split between CPU-bound and GPU-bound tasks. Single-core CPU performance is positioned in the lower tier, as shown by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests. However, multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall into the average tier. The server excels in GPU-accelerated workloads, particularly in LLM inference. It achieves top-tier performance in prompt processing and text generation for small and medium models, though performance scales down to average when processing prompts for large models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the t1-le-45 offers a balanced entry point for GPU compute without the premium associated with newer-generation architectures. The inclusion of dedicated CPU cores and local NVMe storage reduces resource contention. This server is best suited for machine learning inference, small-to-medium model training, data science pipelines, and GPU-accelerated rendering tasks that require dedicated compute resources but do not demand the highest single-thread CPU speeds.
description: The OVHcloud t1-le-45 is a dedicated virtual server designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon Silver 4214 processor with 8 physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, it is equipped with 45.0 GB of RAM and a 300 GB NVMe SSD. Graphics and parallel processing workloads are handled by a single NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. While single-core CPU benchmarks place this server in the lower performance tier, its multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth are average. Crucially, the t1-le-45 delivers top-tier performance in LLM inference for small and medium models. This hardware profile makes it a cost-effective option for machine learning inference, data science, and parallel computing tasks that benefit from dedicated GPU acceleration without requiring the latest generation hardware.
og_description: OVHcloud t1-le-45 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring an Intel Xeon Silver 4214 CPU, 45 GB RAM, a 300 GB NVMe SSD, and an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for machine learning and parallel computing.
meta_description: OVHcloud t1-le-45 is a GPU-accelerated server with 8 dedicated cores, 45 GB RAM, a 300 GB NVMe SSD, and an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU.
tagline: A dedicated GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring an NVIDIA V100 graphics processor and NVMe storage for efficient parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for parallel processing
8 dedicated Intel Xeon Silver 4214 physical cores at 3.0 GHz
45 GB system memory and 300 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in small and medium LLM inference tasks
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Best suited for machine learning inference and data science pipelines
